name: airtable
description: Read and write records in Airtable bases and tables

envVars.name: AIRTABLE_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Airtable OAuth Client ID (from your OAuth integration)

tools.name: Get Base
tools.description: Get schema information for a specific base

tools.name: List Records
tools.description: List records from a table with optional filtering

tools.name: Get Record
tools.description: Get a specific record by ID

tools.name: Create Record
tools.description: Create a new record in a table

prompts.title: Query my data
prompts.prompt: Search and query records from my Airtable bases. Find specific information across tables.

prompts.title: Add a record
prompts.prompt: Create a new record in an Airtable table with the specified field values.

prompts.title: Analyze base structure
prompts.prompt: Analyze the structure and schema of an Airtable base, including all tables and their fields.
